selection_rule: Subset of tasks that directly support body care, mental health, access, medical needs, relationship/social care, decompression, or low-spoon regulation.

currency_rules.normalization_formula: total_copper = copper + 10*silver + 100*gold + 1000*platinum; then rebuild as platinum, gold, silver, copper with copper/silver/gold each 0-9.

tasks.title: Accessibility supplies check
tasks.notes: Check supplies that keep the house easier and safer.
tinySteps: Check wipes, gloves, masks, meds organizers, chargers, trash bags, and hydration supplies.
Add missing items to GiftLink or shopping list.
Move high-use items into reach zones.
Stop after the list; buying can be separate.

tasks.title: Therapy admin — light pass
tasks.notes: One small admin pass for appointments, paperwork, or goals.
tinySteps: Write one therapy goal or one concern.
Schedule recovery time after hard calls.
